architecture.style: domain-model + runtime core + provider adapters + tool registry + session persistence + event logging

critical_modules.domain: Message, ToolCall, AgentResponse, Session, ToolSpec, Event
critical_modules.session: SessionManager + SessionStore persist message history to .openagent/sessions
critical_modules.subagent: SubagentManager runs isolated loop and is exposed via delegate tool

verified_capabilities: CLI/REPL startup via openagent.sh and console entrypoint
tool-call protocol persisted in session history
bash success and failing command handling

partial_capabilities.name: delegate/subagent
partial_capabilities.detail: subagent execution succeeds, but parent agent may repeatedly re-read results during confirmation and trigger repetitive_tool_loop fallback

recent_fixes: filtered noisy runtime directories from list_files
strengthened system prompt for exact file/command output
added loop resilience fallback for repetitive tool loops and max-step instability
implemented AppendFileTool to match runtime registry
added tests for builtin tools and loop resilience

next_stage_focus.name: stage2_runtime_stabilization
goals: eliminate repetitive confirmation loops after delegate or exact-output tasks
add stronger completion heuristics in AgentLoop
add more realistic CLI smoke tests
keep degraded runs resumable without crashing the REPL
